project.name: TUGAS-AKHIR-VAR-TATA-SURYA
project.currentFocus: Mobile AR scanner stabilization: remove fullscreen behavior, enforce fixed viewport layers, facingMode camera switch, and smaller solar model scale.

lastAchievements: Replaced camera switching from deviceId enumeration to facingMode toggle with scene rebuild and manual stream override.
Stabilized scanner viewport with fixed full-screen layers, dynamic --vh usage, and safe-area-aware HUD controls.
Reduced solar model scale by device class, added debug hit-zone material flag, and added fallback-first model loading behavior.
Updated planet detail scales for mobile-safe rendering and synchronized docs (DESIGN and design-intent).
pendingIssues: Manual validation on real iOS Safari hardware is still required.
Final hit-zone offsets may need per-device tuning after on-device tap calibration.
nextBestActions: Run on-device smoke test on Android Chrome (Infinix Note 40) and iOS Safari.
Set DEBUG_HIT_ZONES to false after hit-zone calibration is accepted.
Retest marker detection distance and camera switch behavior across portrait and landscape usage.
validationState: npm run preview startup + HTTP probe (127.0.0.1:4173): PASS (200)

designContinuity.currentConceptualAnchor: Handheld optical instrument panel (camera-first scanner HUD).
